description: Business capabilities that drive the State Application Inventory web app.

capabilities.name: Agency Inventory Management
capabilities.description: Agencies can add, update, and retire application records continuously throughout the year using controlled fields and values.

capabilities.name: Identity & Access Control
capabilities.description: Identity provider authentication with agency-scoped roles — admins, submitters, and viewers — ensuring agencies only see their own data.

capabilities.name: Data Quality Enforcement
capabilities.description: Required fields, controlled vocabularies, and validation rules prevent bad data from entering the system at the point of entry.

capabilities.name: Configurable Alerting & Notification
capabilities.description: Platform admins define metrics, thresholds, and policy rules that trigger automated notifications to the right agency roles. Built as a generic rules processor to support agency-defined alerts in a future release.

capabilities.name: Annual Certification
capabilities.description: Agencies review, attest, and submit their inventory for annual certification. Stale records block submission until resolved.

capabilities.name: Platform Admin & Configuration
capabilities.description: Platform admins manage business rules, view all agency data, monitor compliance, and configure notification thresholds.

capabilities.name: Portfolio Intelligence
capabilities.description: The state IT authority analyzes application inventory data across all agencies to identify technology duplication, consolidation candidates, and shared service opportunities — supporting internal planning and statewide portfolio decisions.
